title: A Thousand‐Year Silence Ends: C.S. Douglas Revives the Ancient Art of the Rubáiyát in Quatrains: Echoes of Existence

title: From the old to the new: Pompeii project revives ancient wine making tradition
description: Heritage is at the heart of a wine making project in Pompeii that is aiming to re-establish the southern Italian volcanic region's age-old reputation for producing quality grapes from within the walls of its archaeological site.

title: Scientists Unearth Exceptionally Well-preserved Archaeopteryx fossil, Solving the Biggest Mystery of Dinosaur Flight - Indian Defence Review
description: Scientists Unearth Exceptionally Well-preserved Archaeopteryx fossil, Solving the Biggest Mystery of Dinosaur Flight Indian Defence Review

title: Why some people still believe that aliens shaped ancient civilisations
description: Could ancient humans really have built the pyramids without extraterrestrial help? Or do such questions reveal more about modern anxieties than the past itself? The idea that aliens assisted the builders of ancient monuments was promoted by the Swiss author Erich von Däniken in his bestselling book Chariot of the Gods- published in 1968. Von [...]

title: Tiny extinct bat found in NZ fossil record
description: A palaeontologist studying fossil fragments in Central Otago has identified a previously unknown, but now extinct, bat.
